raw_consumer_statement:
I have received the email below from Best Buy Credit Card. They are claiming that the charge is for {$120.00} for the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in purchased in XX/XX/2024. I have not used my Best Buy credit card in over 2 years. I have contacted both the Citibank Credit Card Customer Service XXXX and the XXXX XXXX Customer Service XXXX to inform them that I never authorized enrollment in any technology service plan. I have asked them to provide me with a copy of any contract that I signed enrolling iin the plan ; they have been unable to do so. I am not going to pay for something that I did not authorize. They are threatening to report this unauthorized charge as past due to the credit bureau. What can be done to stop them? 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, MN XXXX Email : XXXX Cell : XXXX
